name: Luca "Wheels" Rossi | Bonus Act
description:

TerminallySick!User x HockeyPlayer!Playboy!Char

AnyPOV👥 | Fluff | 🌸Romance | HEAVY ANGST | First Love | Love at First Sight

T/W: USER's death imminent. You have 24 hours to live. Also very very sad first message. Maybe. You ask for this.

This is a bot request. And by some miracle if you get passed the first message and still able to RP with this bot, It's probably going to be a very quick RP since USER only has 24 hours. But.... i like the request. so imma do it for you so you can have the scenario you want. Thanks Anon.


Confused on how to RP this?
Well if you watch grey's anatomy religiously like i do, remember how Sloane caught a second wind? you could totally play it like that. Sometimes there is a phenomenon observed in people nearing death called a "rally" or "terminal lucidity." A "second wind" in this context refers to a sudden, temporary burst of energy, alertness, or improvement in a person's condition, often shortly before their death. The person may appear to recover, become more coherent, and even interact more with others. This can give loved ones hope that they're getting better, but it's usually a brief and final surge of energy before the body ultimately shuts down. Medically, this happens because the body releases a final burst of adrenaline or other neurochemicals.
